title: Verify @kody release creates release PR
description: Test @kody release command to verify it: 1) bumps version correctly using conventional commits, 2) generates changelog grouped by commit type, 3) creates a release PR on release/v<version> branch targeting the default branch (main). This is part of the T41 test suite verifying the release feature of @kody-ade/engine v0.1.62.
existing_patterns: .claude/commands/kody-test-suite.md - Test suite pattern for Phase 3 release tests (T26 dry-run, T27 full release)
kody.config.json - Kody engine configuration with defaultBranch: main and github owner/repo settings
